nasb.text: For this is the will of God, your sanctification; that is, that you abstain from sexual immorality;

esv.text: For this is the will of God, your sanctification:  that you abstain from sexual immorality;

cnv.text: 神的旨意是要你們聖潔，遠避淫行；

ccb.text: 上帝的旨意是要你们圣洁，远避淫乱的事，

csbs.text: 神的旨意正是要你们分别为圣：要你们远避淫乱，
